creator: jonasbsd@gmail.com
text:
I tried to update FreeBSD 12.1 to version 12.2. But after upgrading Xorg does not work.

FreeBSD gave an error and Intel Drive does not create /dev/dri/card0. Looking through the forums I saw that it creates the file when reading the i915kms module at boot. But it does not create the file structure.

I formatted my hard drive and tried to install version 12.2 again. I followed my basic drivers installation script, but it didn't work. I did the same procedure with 12.1 again and everything worked.

Unfortunately, this problem occurred. He was excited about the new feutures. Compatibility of Jail with Linux mainly.
